title: Impromptu - To Kate Carol
content:
When from your gems of thought I turn
To those pure orbs, your heart to learn,
I scarce know which to prize most high,
The bright i-dea, or the bright dear-eye.
meaning:
"Impromptu - To Kate Carol" is a quintessential example of Edgar Allan Poe's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
